tips.title: TipsMoney
tips.subtitle: Your AI-powered financial assistant
tips.welcome: Hi! I'm **TipsMoney**, your financial assistant. I look at your income and expenses to suggest savings, organization and investment tips. Ask me anything or pick a suggestion below. 💸

suggestions.s1: How am I doing this month?
suggestions.s4: How do I build an emergency fund?

errors.rate: Too many questions in a short time. Try again shortly.
errors.credits: AI credits exhausted. Add credits to your workspace.
errors.generic: I couldn't answer right now. Please try again.

perfil.title: My Profile
perfil.desc: Update your photo, name, email, and manage account security.

config.title: Settings
config.desc: Change the theme (light/dark), language (Portuguese, English, or Spanish), and export your data.

items.a: Yes, all core features are free to use.
Yes. Your data is encrypted and tied only to your account.

items.q: Do I need to share my bank password?
items.a: No. Bank integration is done by importing statements (OFX or CSV), without accessing your account.
Any bank that exports statements in OFX or CSV: Nubank, Inter, Banco do Brasil, Itaú, Bradesco, Santander, Caixa, and others.

items.q: Can I use it on multiple devices?
items.a: Yes. Just sign in with the same account and your data will sync.

items.q: How do I back up my data?
items.a: Go to 'My Profile' or 'Settings' and click 'Export JSON' to save a copy.
It's an AI assistant that analyzes your finances and answers questions about saving, budgeting, and investing.

items.q: Can I edit or delete a transaction?
items.a: Yes. In 'Transactions', click the record to edit or use the delete option.

items.q: How do I change the app's language or theme?
items.a: Go to 'Settings' to switch between Portuguese, English, or Spanish and enable dark mode.

items.q: I forgot my password, what do I do?
items.a: On the login screen, click 'Recover' and we'll send a reset link to your email.
